title: Ginger Paella
description: A twist on traditional paella, this dish combines the flavors of India with the richness of Spain.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the and and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the paella and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the spanish and indulge and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with fresh cilantro, if desired.
